ApiVersion.description: Represents the version information of the API

financialInstitutionId.description: This is the unique identifier of the Institution that the Financial Advisor is attached to.

crdNumber.description: CRD Number of the Financial Advisor.

iardNumber.description: IARD Number of the Financial Advisor.

investorId.description: Represents the unique ID, provided by Monark, associated with the Investor submitting an IOI, investing in an SPV, or taking any action in the secondary market.

preIPOCompanyId.description: The unique ID of the PreIPOCompany associated with a submission of an Indication of Interest.

currency.description: Currency in which the IOI was submitted. Monark only accepts IOIs submitted in USD.

CreateIndicationOfInterest.description: CreateIndicationOfInterest represents the primary offering information to Create an IoI.

financialInstitutionId.description:
The Financial Institution ID associated with the Investor.
If not provided, the default Financial Institution for the Partner will be used.

financialAdvisorId.description: The Financial Advisor ID associated with the Investor.

investorReferenceId.description: Represents the unique ID provided by a Partner, used to identify an Investor.

CreateInvestor.description: Create Investor Lead represents the investor lead information required for the primary offering.

preIPOCompanySPVId.description: The SPV ID that this Subscription relates to.

investorId.description: ID of the Investor associated with this InvestorSubscription.

amountReservedDollars.description: Describes the amount, in dollars, an Investor intends to invest into an SPV.

amountReservedShares.description: Describes how many underlying shares in the pre-IPO company are associated with this InvestorSubscription. This must be a whole number of shares.

questionnaireId.description: Unique ID of the Questionnaire being answered.

createQuestionAnswers.description: Pairing of all the Questions and Investor-provided responses associated with the Questionnaire.

questionnaireQuestionId.description: Questionnaire QuestionId of the question being answered.

value.description: Value of the answer to the question.

registeredFundId.description: The Registered Fund to subscribe to.

CreateRegisteredFundSubscription.description: Request model for creating a registered fund subscription.

url.description: The delivery url for the webhook

token.description: Token value used to create a signature on webhook delivery.

id.description: Unique identifier for the document.

url.description: URL link to view the document.

investorId.description: Unique identifier of the associated investor, if any.

preIPOCompanyId.description: Unique identifier of the associated PreIPOCompany, if any.

preIPOCompanyInvestmentId.description: Unique identifier of the associated PreIPOCompanyInvestment, if any.

preIPOCompanySPVId.description: Unique identifier of the associated PreIPOCompanySPV, if any.

investorSubscriptionId.description: Unique identifier of the associated InvestorSubscription, if any.

partnerId.description: Unique identifier of the associated partner, if any.

registeredFundId.description: Unique identifier of the registered fund, if any.

templateDocument.description: Boolean value to dictate if this is a template.

taxYear.description: Optional tax year to tag the document with.

Document.description: Represents a document associated with the fund admin.

id.description: Id of the Entity Investor.

dbaName.description: DBA or Trade name of the entity.

beneficialOwnershipCount.description:
Total number of beneficial owners associated with this entity investor.
This number is used to calculate the remaining number of seats in an SPV after an entity invests.

phone.description: An unformatted phone number which does not include the country code.

phoneCountryCode.description: Phone country code (do not include a '+' sign).

jurisdiction.description: Either a US state or country of incorporation.

formationDate.description: Date that the entity was formed.

taxId.description:
The tax id (EIN) for entities; for revocable trusts, a tax id is not required.
This PII field is tokenized.

street.description: Primary address street of the entity.

city.description: City where the entity is located.

state.description:
State (or region) of the entity. Use valid state/region codes.
See https://github.com/country-regions/country-region-data/blob/master/data.json for valid state codes per country.

countryCode.description:
Country code of the entity. Country code of the investor. Check
https://github.com/country-regions/country-region-data/blob/master/data.json for valid country codes.

mailingAddressStreet.description: Street mailing address of the entity.

mailingAddressCity.description: City mailing address of the entity.

mailingAddressState.description:
State mailing address of the entity.
See https://github.com/country-regions/country-region-data/blob/master/data.json for valid state codes per country.

mailingAddressZipCode.description: Zip code mailing address of the entity.

mailingAddressCountry.description:
Country mailing address of the entity. Check
https://github.com/country-regions/country-region-data/blob/master/data.json for valid country codes.

isSubscriptionAdvisorOrERA.description: Indicates if the person is registered as an adviser for the subscription or as an exempt reporting adviser.

EntityInvestor.description: Represents an entity investor within the primary offering.

id.description: Unique ID of the fee structure.

shareClassId.description: Optional unique ID of the Share Class associated with this Fee Structure.

registeredFundId.description: Optional unique ID of the Registered Fund associated with this Fee Structure.

description.description: Text field used to describe the fee structure.

FeeStructure.description: Represents a fee structure that can be associated with either a registered fund or a share class.

id.description: Gets or sets id represents the unique id of the Financial Advisor on the internal system.

financialInstitutionId.description: This is the unique identifier of the Institution that the Financial Advisor is attached to.

crdNumber.description: CRD Number of the Financial Advisor.

iardNumber.description: IARD Number of the Financial Advisor.

partnerId.description: The partner associated with this FinancialInstitution.

legalName.description: Legal name of the legal entity interacting with Monark's APIs.

crdNumber.description: CRD number associated with this financial institution.

kycRequired.description: The KYC requirements for the Financial Institution.

isDefault.description: Indicates if this is the default Financial Institution for the Partner.

state.description:

See https://github.com/country-regions/country-region-data/blob/master/data.json for valid state codes per country.

updatedAt.description: Date the FinancialInstitution was last updated.

id.description: Unique ID for fund advisor

logoUrl.description: Link to representative logo for fund advisor

description.description: Brief description of focus, history, and experience of fund advisor

x.description: Link to fund advisor's X page

countryCode.description:
Country code of the investor. Check
https://github.com/country-regions/country-region-data/blob/master/data.json for valid country codes.

phoneCountryCode.description: When creating or updating a resource send both phone and phone_country_code or neither. Phone country code is validated against a valid list of phone country codes which you can find here (https://github.com/mukeshsoni/country-telephone-data). Do not include a + (plus sign) at the beginning of this string.

phoneNumber.description: An unformatted phone number which does not include country code. Refer to this region data (https://github.com/mukeshsoni/country-telephone-data) to select the correct phone country code. Phone numbers where phone_country_code is "1" must have 10 digits.

status.description: The current status of this InvestorSubscriptionAction.

type.description: The type of action required to be performed by the Investor, as part of executing the Subscription. DocumentSign and DocumentAcknowledge can both be completed by “signing” the associated document. InvestorSubscriptionActions with a type of DocumentSign mean that the associated document, once signed, will be populated with an automatically generated signature. InvestorSubscriptionActions with a type of DocumentAcknowledge mean that the associated document, once signed, will be counted as acknowledged but are not required to be populated by a signature.

responsibleParty.description: This describes the entity responsible for acknowledging that the Action has been completed. Partners acknowledge that actions have been completed on behalf of their Investors.

actionText.description: Text for an action that is a text acknowledgement.

managementFee.description: The management fee charged by the manager of the Layered SPV, expressed as a percentage.

managementFeeFrequency.description: Indicates how often the management fee is charged (e.g., "Annual").

carriedInterest.description: Carried interest charged by the Layered SPV.

gpName.description: The name of the general partner serving on the Layered SPV. This field is not nullable and intended for internal use only.

fundStructure.description: Describes the fund structure, such as "3(c)(1)" or "3(c)(7)." This field is not nullable.

spvOutstandingShareCount.description: The total number of shares issued by the Layered SPV. This number may be used to calculate the 10% threshold for triggering a look-through provision.

lpStakeShareCount.description: Describes the size, in number of shares in the Layered SPV, of the position involved in this transaction.

lpStakePercentage.description: Describes the portion of the whole SPV represented by the LP stake being sold. This number can be found by dividing: SPVOutstandingShareCount / LPStakeShareCount. This number, represented as a percentage, may be used to determine whether or not the 10% lookthrough provision should be triggered.

isUSBased.description: Is the Investor based in the United States?

state.description: 2/3 letter state code of the investor. Check https://github.com/country-regions/country-region-data/blob/master/data.json for valid state (region) codes

countryCode.description:
Country code of the investor. Check
https://github.com/country-regions/country-region-data/blob/master/data.json for valid country codes.

phoneCountryCode.description: When creating or updating a resource send both phone and phone_country_code or neither. Phone country code is validated against a valid list of phone country codes which you can find here (https://github.com/mukeshsoni/country-telephone-data). Do not include a + (plus sign) at the beginning of this string.

phoneNumber.description: An unformatted phone number which does not include country code. Refer to this region data (https://github.com/mukeshsoni/country-telephone-data) to select the correct phone country code. Phone numbers where phone_country_code is "1" must have 10 digits.

mailingAddressAptSuiteNo.description: Investor's primary mailing Apt or Suite Number.

mailingAddressState.description:
Investor's primary mailing address state.
See https://github.com/country-regions/country-region-data/blob/master/data.json for valid state codes per country.

mailingAddressZipCode.description: Investor's primary mailing address zip code.

mailingAddressCountry.description:
Investor's primary mailing address country. Check
https://github.com/country-regions/country-region-data/blob/master/data.json for valid country codes.

hasBackupWithholding.description: Describes if the Investor is subject to backup withholding.

exemptPayeeCode.description: Investor’s exempt payee code if the Investor is exempt from backup withholding.

isSubscriptionAdvisorOrERA.description: Is the investor registered as an adviser for the subscription or an exempt reporting adviser?

email.description: Email address associated with an Investor.

passportNumber.description: Investor Passport Number. - Only Required for Non-US Investors.

citizenship.description: Country code of the Investor’s citizenship. Check https://github.com/country-regions/country-region-data/blob/master/data.json for valid country codes

qualifiedStatus.description: The qualification status of an Investor.

stage.description: The stage the SPV transitioned to.

timestamp.description: The UTC timestamp when the transition to this stage occurred.

changedBy.description: Optional identifier of the user or system that triggered the transition.

note.description: Optional note or reason associated with the stage transition.

MonarkStageTransition.description: Represents a transition of an SPV to a specific stage in its lifecycle.

id.description: Unique ID associated with this NAV report

shareClassId.description: The ID of the class of shares associated with this NAV report

reportDate.description: The date of this NAV report

nav.description: Most Recent Net Asset Value of the fund

NAVReport.description: Represents a NAV (Net Asset Value) report for a share class.

id.description: Unique ID, provided by Monark, associated with a Partner.

legalEntityName.description: Legal Entity Name of the partner.

Partner.description: Partner represents the primary offering information of the investor.

id.description: Unique ID associated with a PreIPOCompany.

linkedIn.description: The LinkedIn profile URL associated with the PreIPOCompany.

facebook.description: The Facebook profile URL of the PreIPOCompany.

country.description: Country where the PreIPOCompany is located.

address.description: PreIPOCompany’s address. This attribute will describe the company’s headquarters.

type.description: Type of entity of the PreIPOCompany.

yearEst.description: The year the PreIPOCompany was established.

numJobs.description: The number of employees at the PreIPO Company.

logoURL.description: A URL link associated with the PreIPOCompany’s logo.

totalFunding.description: PreIPOCompany total funding, expressed in USD.

lastFundingTotal.description: The total size of the last funding round, expressed in USD.

totalFundingRounds.description: PreIPOCompany total number of funding rounds.

lastFundingDate.description: The date of the PreIPOCompany’s most recent funding.

lastFundingType.description: The type (Equity or Debt) of the last funding round.

numInvestors.description: The number of investors in a PreIPOCompany. This number represents the number of institutional investors that have participated in primary fundraises.

twelveMonthTrailingRevenue.description: Revenue generated in the previous 12 months by this PreIPOCompany.

lastValuation.description: Most recent valuation of the PreIPOCompany, based on the most recent funding round. Expressed in USD.

lastSharePrice.description: The PreIPOCompany’s share price at the most recent funding round, expressed in USD.

numCustomers.description: The number of customers serviced by a Pre-IPO Company.

executiveTeam.description: Array of the PreIPOCompany’s executive or management team.

numSharesOutstanding.description: The number of shares that have been issued by the PreIPOCompany.

notableInvestorsLogos.description: A list of the notable investors’ logos associated with a PreIPOCompany.

categories.description: A list of the categories a PreIPOCompany belongs to.

referencePrice.description: The PreIPOCompany’s reference price, expressed in USD.

referencePriceDate.description: Date and time when the PreIPOCompany's reference price was last updated.

symbol.description: Unique symbol assigned to this Pre-IPO Company. Each single asset SPV associated with this Pre-IPO Company will have its own, SPV-specific symbol that leverages this symbol as its "base".

PreIPOCompany.description: PreIPOCompany represents the public information we provide for a PreIPOCompany in the Primary Offering.

id.description: The entity ID attached to this funding round.

preIPOCompanyId.description: The unique ID of the PreIPOCompany associated with the funding round.

roundName.description: Represents the name of the funding round.

shareDetails.description: Collection of share details associated with the funding rounds.

citations.description: Collection of citations associated with the funding rounds.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PreIPOCompanyInvestment.

preIPOCompanyID.description: The PreIPOCompany associated with this Investment.

shareType.description: Indicates the type of shares for the Pre-IPOCompanyInvestment. Possible values may include "Common," "Preferred," or "Common and Preferred."

shareClass.description: Share class of PreIPOCompany. Can be Series A, Series B, Series C, etc.

numberOfShares.description: The number of shares in the PreIPOCompany associated with this Investment.

totalCapitalRaise.description: The net amount of capital, including all commissions and fees associated with this PreIPOCompanyInvestment. This number determines the total amount of cash that needs to be syndicated in order to execute the transaction.

investmentSize.description: This is the total amount that will be sent to the seller or issuer, after all commissions and fees have been paid.

pricePerShare.description: The price per share of the PreIPOCompany that will be paid to acquire the shares.

transactionType.description: A transactionType of primary means that Monark has received an allocation in a PreIPOCompany's primary capital raise, and we are syndicating capital through an SPV to participate in the raise. transactionType of secondary means that an existing shareholder in the PreIPOCompany is looking for liquidity and Monark is interacting with the shareholder as a single LP, raising capital through the SPV and buying shares from the seller. transactionType of Tender Offer means that Monark is participating in a company sponsored share repurchase program through an SPV, helping the PreIPOCompany offer shareholders liquidity.

layeredSPV.description: Describes whether or not the PreIPOCompanyInvestment is taking place through a Layered SPV.

id.description: The unique ID attached to this news object.

preIPOCompanyId.description: The unique ID of the PreIPOCompany associated with the news.

newsId.description: The ID for this news object, generated by our third party data provider.

releaseDate.description: The release date of the news.

articles.description: A list of articles associated with the News.

id.description: The entity ID attached to this article.

preIPOCompanyNewsId.description: The pre-IPO company news entity ID attached to this article.

datePublished.description: The published date of the article.

id.description: The unique ID attached to this research document.

preIPOCompanyId.description: The ID of the PreIPOCompany associated with a research document.

title.description: The title of the research document.

relation.description: Relation of entity of the research document.

source.description: Third party data service providing access to this research document.

documentJson.description: A detailed description of a document, including all of its contents.

id.description: Unique ID associated with an SPV.

preIPOCompanyInvestmentId.description: The unique ID of the PreIPOCompany that the SPV is investing into.

preIPOCompanyId.description: The PreIPOCompany which the SPV will be investing into.

totalDollarAllocation.description: This number describes the total amount of capital that will be raised into the SPV, including management fees, commission paid to Partners distributing the SPV, fund admin fees, and all other expenses.

minCommitmentAmount.description: The minimum amount that an Investor can invest into an SPV during a primary offering.

valuation.description: Describes the implied valuation of the associated PreIPOCompany, and it accounts for fees, commissions, markups (if any), and share price. This number is set when the SPV is created.

description.description: Longer description of the SPV’s strategy or purpose.

notableInvestors.description: A list of notable investors associated with an SPV.

masterLLCName.description: The name of the Master LLC.

managementFee.description: The one time, up front management fee charged by the SPV.

managementFeeYearsPayable.description: The number of years over which the management fee will be paid. SPVs offered through Monark will have this number set to 1, as the SPV will charge a one time up front management fee.

fundingDeadline.description: Funding deadline associated with the primary issuance of an SPV. Prefunded SPVs may not have a funding deadline. SPVs will no longer accept Subscriptions once the Funding Deadline has passed.

exemptionsClaimed.description: The exemptions claimed by a PreIPOCompanySPV. These align with the SEC's Form D Item 6: Federal Exemptions and Exclusions Claimed.

monarkStage.description: The stage that an SPV is in. Refer to the “SPV Status Transitions” page in our Guides for a detailed description of each stage.

cusip.description: CUSIP assigned to the SPV. Monark acquires and assigns the CUSIP after the first trade has been executed through our ATS.

tradingSymbol.description: Symbol assigned to the SPV. This symbol is created and assigned to the SPV upon its creation. See the [Symbology guide](https://api-docs.monark-markets.com/docs/symbology) for a more detailed description of how symbols are generated.

closeDate.description: The date that the SPV officially closed. This field will be populated after the close of the SPV.

spvCustodian.description: Custodian where SPV shares are held.

totalShareAllocation.description: The number of shares in the PreIPOCompany that will be held by the SPV.

totalNumberOfSeats.description: The number of shares in the PreIPOCompany that will be held by the SPV.

numberOfSeatsRemaining.description: The number of remaining LP positions in an SPV available to Investors. Each time an Investor completes a Subscription, this number decreases by one. Once this number reaches zero, the MonarkStage attribute associated with the SPV will move from “PRIMARY_FUNDRAISE” to “PRE_CLOSE_REVIEW.”

remainingDollarAllocation.description: The remaining dollar amount in a primary fundraise of an SPV. Once this number reaches zero the SPV will no longer accept new Investors on the primary market.

remainingShareAllocation.description: The remaining number of shares in a primary fundraise of an SPV. Once this number reaches zero the SPV will no longer accept new Investors on the primary market.

preFundedInventory.description: Indicates whether the SPV will be prefunded.

totalCommission.description: Size, in USD, of the brokerage commission associated with this PreIPOCompanySPV. This is the amount left over after the ERA pays its fees out of the cash withheld from the up front management fee.

monarkCommissionSplit.description: The percentage of the TotalCommission that will be paid to MMM Securities LLC.

demandSideCommissionSplit.description: The percentage of the TotalCommission that will be paid to the Partner distributing the SPV.

investorPricePerShare.description: The price per share of the PreIPOCompany, excluding fees, that an investor will pay when they invest in an SPV.

investorFeePerShare.description: The fee per share of the PreIPOCompany, that an Investor will pay when they invest in an SPV on the primary issuance. The InvestorPricePerShare plus the InvestorFeePerShare will determine the AllInPricePerShare.

allInPricePerShare.description: The total amount per share that an Investor will pay, including fees, when they invest in an SPV.

documents.description: The base documents associated with the SPV (Optional).

preIPOCompanyName.description: The name of the parent company.

manager.description: The manager details of this SPV.

coManagers.description: List of Co-Managers of this SPV.

PreIPOCompanySPV.description: PreIPOCompanySPV represents the public information we provide for a PreIPOCompanySPV in the Primary Offering.

id.description: Unique ID associated with a Questionnaire.

name.description: Represents the name of the Questionnaire object.

title.description: Title represents the display title used for the questionnaire.

partnerName.description: Name of the Partner associated with an Investor.

questions.description: Questions represents a list of questions associated with the Questionnaire.

Questionnaire.description: Questionnaire repesents the public information we provide for a Questionnaire in the  Primary Offering.

id.description: Unique ID associated with a Questionnaire answer.

questionnaireId.description: Unique ID of the Questionnaire being answered.

questionAnswers.description: All the questions answered from the Questionnaire.

id.description: Unique ID associated with a Questionnaire question.

sequence.description: Order sequence of the question within the Questionnaire.

status.description: Question status, could be active or disabled. Questions can be set to disabled and new questions created if a Partners elects to edit one or more of the questions presented to their Investors.

explanation.description: An explanation of the question presented within a Questionnaire. Helps the Investor understand the question being asked by providing additional context.

options.description: A list of potential answers associated with a question.

scaleMin.description: Optional minimum value for a scale question.

scaleMax.description: Optional maximum value for a scale question.

scaleStep.description: Optional step value for a scale question.

id.description: Unique ID associated with a Questionnaire question answer pairing.

questionOptions.description: A list of potential answers associated with a question.

value.description: Value of the answer to the question.

id.description: Unique identification number for Registered Fund

symbol.description: Symbol assigned to this registered fund

logoUrl.description: Link to logo for Registered Fund

aum.description: Current reported AUM of Registered Fund

assetClass.description: General asset class the Registered Fund is targeting

vintage.description: First year the fund began fundraising efforts

assetNum.description: The number of assets held by this fund

fundServEligible.description: Is this fund supported by NSCC?

act33Exemption.description: Indicates the exemption from the 33' Act used to distribute securities in the Registered Fund

subscriptionProcess.description: Describes the subscription process of the fund

redemptionValue.description: Percent of the fund's NAV that will be processed as a redemption each time the redemption window opens

redemptionProcess.description: Describes the redemption process of the fund

distributionProcess.description: Describes the fund's process for distributions

nonAccreditedInvestor.description: Does this registered fund accept non accredited investors?

accreditedInvestor.description: Does this registered fund require accreditation status?

qualifiedClientInvestor.description: Does this registered fund require investors to be qualified clients?

qualifiedPurchaserInvestor.description: Does this registered fund require investors to be qualified purchasers?

nonUSInvestor.description: Does this registered fund allow for non-US based investors?

fundAdvisor.description: The fund advisor for this registered fund.

shareClasses.description: Associated share classes for the fund.

feeStructures.description: Collection of Fee Structures directly associated with this Registered Fund.

documents.description: Documents associated with the Registered Fund.

id.description: Unique identifier for the subscription.

registeredFundId.description: The Registered Fund being subscribed to.

status.description: Current status of the document workflow.

currentDocumentUrl.description: URL to view the current version of the document.

investorSignedAt.description: Date when investor signed the document.

advisorSignedAt.description: Date when advisor signed the document.

updatedAt.description: When the subscription was last updated.

registeredFundName.description: The name of the related fund.

registeredFundSymbol.description: The symbol of the related fund.

investorFullName.description: Full name of the associated investor.

id.description: Unique ID for share class

registeredFundId.description: Unique ID of the registered fund associated with this Share Class

name.description: Name of the share class, usually a single letter

symbol.description: Symbol applied to this class of shares. Some funds may provide a symbol for the share class.

accountType.description: Describes the types of accounts that can invest into this Share Class.

initialMinimumInvestment.description: The lowest amount of capital that an investor must commit to qualify for this particular share class. If NULL, the share class can accept investments with no minimum

initialMaximumInvestment.description: The highest amount of capital that an investor can commit while still remaining within a particular share class. This attribute might be null if there is no cap.

subsequentMinimumInvestment.description: The lowest amount of capital that an investor must commit to qualify for this particular share class, if they have already submitted a subscription.

subsequentMaximumInvestment.description: The highest amount of capital that an investor can commit while still remaining within a particular share class, if they have already submitted a subscription for this share class. This attribute might be null if there is no cap.

feeStructures.description: Collection of Fee Structures associated with this Share Class.

navReports.description: List of NAV Reports for this share class

ShareClass.description: Represents a share class of a registered fund.

issuePrice.description: Issue price of the share detail.

investorId.description: The investorId associated with the document.

signatureName.description: The name to place as the signature on the document.

SignatureRequest.description: Request model for adding a signature to a document.

dbaName.description: DBA or Trade name of the entity.

beneficialOwnershipCount.description:
Total number of beneficial owners associated with this entity investor.
This number is used to calculate the remaining number of seats in an SPV after an entity invests.

isUSBased.description: Indicates if the entity is based in the US.

phone.description: An unformatted phone number which does not include the country code.

phoneCountryCode.description: Phone country code (do not include a '+' sign).

jurisdiction.description: Either a US state or country of incorporation.

formationDate.description: Date that the entity was formed.

taxId.description:
The tax id (EIN) for entities; for revocable trusts, a tax id is not required.
This PII field is tokenized.

street.description: Primary address street of the entity.

city.description: City where the entity is located.

state.description:
State (or region) of the entity. Use valid state/region codes.
See https://github.com/country-regions/country-region-data/blob/master/data.json for valid state codes per country.

countryCode.description:
Country code of the entity. Check
https://github.com/country-regions/country-region-data/blob/master/data.json for valid country codes.

mailingAddressStreet.description: Street mailing address of the entity.

mailingAddressCity.description: City mailing address of the entity.

mailingAddressState.description:
State mailing address of the entity.
See https://github.com/country-regions/country-region-data/blob/master/data.json for valid state codes per country.

mailingAddressZipCode.description: Zip code mailing address of the entity.

mailingAddressCountry.description:
Country mailing address of the entity. Check
https://github.com/country-regions/country-region-data/blob/master/data.json for valid country codes.

isSubscriptionAdvisorOrERA.description: Indicates if the person is registered as an adviser for the subscription or as an exempt reporting adviser.

financialInstitutionId.description: This is the unique identifier of the Institution that the Financial Advisor is attached to.

crdNumber.description: CRD Number of the Financial Advisor.

iardNumber.description: IARD Number of the Financial Advisor.

id.description: ID of the FinancialAdvisor to edit.
Unique ID associated with an IOI.

investorId.description: Represents the unique ID, provided by Monark, associated with the Investor submitting an IOI, investing in an SPV, or taking any action in the secondary market.

preIPOCompanyId.description: The unique ID of the PreIPOCompany associated with a submission of an Indication of Interest.

currency.description: Currency in which the IOI was submitted. Monark only accepts IOIs submitted in USD.

UpdateIndicationOfInterest.description: IndicationOfInterest represents the primary offering information on the IoI.

isUSBased.description: Is the Investor based in the United States?

state.description: 2/3 letter state code of the investor. Check https://github.com/country-regions/country-region-data/blob/master/data.json for valid state (region) codes

countryCode.description:
Country code of the investor. Check
https://github.com/country-regions/country-region-data/blob/master/data.json for valid country codes.

phoneCountryCode.description: When creating or updating a resource send both phone and phone_country_code or neither. Phone country code is validated against a valid list of phone country codes which you can find here (https://github.com/mukeshsoni/country-telephone-data). Do not include a + (plus sign) at the beginning of this string.

phoneNumber.description: An unformatted phone number which does not include country code. Refer to this region data (https://github.com/mukeshsoni/country-telephone-data) to select the correct phone country code. Phone numbers where phone_country_code is "1" must have 10 digits.

mailingAddressAptSuiteNo.description: Investor's primary mailing Apt or Suite Number.

mailingAddressState.description:
Investor's primary mailing address state.
See https://github.com/country-regions/country-region-data/blob/master/data.json for valid state codes per country.

mailingAddressZipCode.description: Investor's primary mailing address zip code.

mailingAddressCountry.description:
Investor's primary mailing address country. Check
https://github.com/country-regions/country-region-data/blob/master/data.json for valid country codes.

hasBackupWithholding.description: Describes if the Investor is subject to backup withholding.

exemptPayeeCode.description: Investor’s exempt payee code if the Investor is exempt from backup withholding.

isSubscriptionAdvisorOrERA.description: Is the investor registered as an adviser for the subscription or an exempt reporting adviser?

email.description: Email address associated with an Investor.

passportNumber.description: Investor Passport Number. - Only Required for Non-US Investors.

citizenship.description: Country code of the Investor’s citizenship. Check https://github.com/country-regions/country-region-data/blob/master/data.json for valid country codes

qualifiedStatus.description: The qualification status of an Investor.

entityInvestorType.description: The type of entity investor, if the investor is an entity investor.

percentageOwned.description: The percentage of the entity owned by the investor.

id.description: Identifier for the individual investor.

investorReferenceId.description: Represents the unique ID provided by a Partner, used to identify an Investor.

individualInvestor.description: Information about the individual investor if this Investor is of that type.

entityInvestor.description: Information about the entity investor if this Investor is of that type.

financialAdvisorId.description: The Financial Advisor ID associated with the Investor.

UpdateInvestor.description: Create Investor represnts the information required to create the investor in the primary offering.

id.description: Unique ID associated with a Webhook.

url.description: The delivery url for the Webhook.

token.description: Token value used to create a signature on webhook delivery.

isActive.description: Flag to dictate if the webhook should be sent events.

id.description: Unique ID associated with a Webhook.

partnerId.description: ID of the Partner associated with an Investor.

url.description: The delivery url for the webhook.

isActive.description: Flag to dictate if the webhook should be sent events.

token.description: Token value used to create a signature on webhook delivery.

id.description: Unique ID associated with a WebhookEvent.
